events.context: Full meta-compounding cycle run. Assessed 3 evolution entries, 6 beliefs, 2 PDCA records. Promotion candidates: alignment-policy (sustained), proto-conscience-policy (new). No deprecation candidates. Consumer integration belief updated F→T. Dashboard PDCA advanced plan→do. 4 issues closed (#12, #36, #38, #42, #44). New artifacts: 18th policy (governance-experimentation), Streeling University (10 depts), probabilistic research grammars (grammar + schemas + weights + TARS modules + ix modules), AI-powered workflows (autofix, ideation, Q&A), 7 ga behavioral tests, 13 wiki pages.

effectiveness.proposition: The governance framework is compounding effectively — each session produces more governance artifacts, closes more gaps, and generates richer state data for the next cycle
